## Return Value

The value at the specified position.

## Discussion

When you create a noise map from a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoise] object, GameplayKit performs the noise generation and processing computations necessary to fill a discrete grid with noise samples. (You specify the size of the grid and its number of samples in the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/init(_:size:origin:sampleCount:seamless:)] initializer.) You can also use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/interpolatedValue(at:)] method to query positions that are not on the discrete integer grid of samples.

# value(at:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the value at the specified position in the noise map’s discrete sample grid.

## Declaration

```swift
func value(at position: vector_int2) -> Float
```

## Parameters

- **position**: The position to query in the noise map’s grid of sampled noise values. Must be within the rectangle from `[0, 0]` to the noise map’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/sampleCount] value.

## Return Value

The value at the specified position.

## Discussion

When you create a noise map from a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoise] object, GameplayKit performs the noise generation and processing computations necessary to fill a discrete grid with noise samples. (You specify the size of the grid and its number of samples in the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/init(_:size:origin:sampleCount:seamless:)] initializer.) Use this method to get sample values from that grid.

You can also use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/interpolatedValue(at:)] method to query positions that are not on the discrete integer grid of samples.

## Accessing Noise Values

- **interpolatedValue(at:)**: Returns the value at the specified position in the noise map, interpolating results for positions not on the discrete sample grid.
- **setValue(_:at:)**: Sets the value at the specified position in the noise map.
